📣 Big news – TikTok Shop is launching in Poland.
Starting 15 June, TikTok Shop will be available to users and businesses in Poland, opening up new ways to reach customers by bringing together entertainment and commerce.
The platform is now live in the Netherlands, Belgium, Austria, and Poland, opening the door to millions of new shoppers and thousands of brands.
And as of June 15, four more countries are open for sellers: Austria, Belgium, the Netherlands, and Poland."},{"url":"https://novadata.io/resources/news/tiktok-shop-europe-4-countries-sell-across-europe-june-2026","title":"TikTok Shop opens 4 EU markets and a Sell Across Europe tool","content":"TikTok announced the expansion from its newsroom on May 28, and trade outlets including eMarketer and Ecommerce News Europe covered it through the week leading up to the launch.
The bigger structural change ships right behind the launch: a new "Sell Across Europe" feature that lets a single seller registration cover multiple European markets instead of a separate setup per country.
Pull sessions, unit-session percentage, and BSR on your own ASINs for the four affected marketplaces for the 30 days before June 15.
Audit FBM and 3PL coverage in the four new markets
The platform already operates in France, Germany, Ireland, Italy, Spain, and the UK, so the European footprint reaches 10 markets at launch.
- TikTok Newsroom: TikTok Shop expands across Europe — Austria, Belgium, the Netherlands, and Poland (May 28, 2026)
- eMarketer: TikTok Shop expands across Europe, opening a growth runway for sellers (June 2026)
All information verified from official Amazon sources and trusted industry analysts as of publication date."},{"url":"https://www.netinfluencer.com/tiktok-shop-expands-to-austria-belgium-the-netherlands-and-poland/","title":"TikTok Shop Expands To Austria, Belgium, The Netherlands, And Poland","content":"The four countries join existing TikTok Shop markets in France, Germany, Ireland, Italy, Spain, and the United Kingdom.
More than 100,000 European businesses have joined TikTok Shop across France, Germany, Italy, Spain, and Ireland since the platform launched in those markets in late 2024 and early 2025.
Daily gross merchandise value across those markets grew by triple digits between August 2025 and February 2026, according to the company’s announcement.
In the U.S., small business sales on TikTok Shop rose 66% in 2025, according to company data, with more than 215,000 small businesses actively selling on the platform, a 25% year-over-year increase.

From 15 June, TikTok Shop will be available to shoppers and retailers in **Austria, Belgium, the Netherlands, and Poland**, joining existing markets in France, Germany, Ireland, Italy, Spain, and the UK. It is a shopping ecosystem where TikTok community-driven trends can turn niche local products into bestsellers, allowing users to discover and instantly buy products via shoppable videos and interactive livestreams without leaving the app. Brands, businesses and retailers of all sizes are leveraging this opportunity to tap into what TikTok Shop has termed, discovery e-commerce. As the service launches in these new countries, local businesses - from side-hustles and entrepreneur-owned startups to global brands - can list their products on TikTok Shop and connect directly with TikTok’s highly engaged audience to expand their digital footprint and unlock new commercial growth. Best money market accounts. TikTok announced another expansion in the availability of TikTok Shop to shoppers and retailers in Austria, Belgium, the Netherlands and Poland. Users in those countries will be able to buy and sell products in the app beginning June 15. The expansion of TikTok's European shopping options is another step in the platform's grand shopping plan, which the company hopes will eventually become a major revenue stream. TikTok said the expansion of TikTok Shops will enable more users to discover and buy products via shoppable videos and interactive livestreams without leaving the app, while also providing more opportunity for EU sellers. As per TikTok: \"Shortly after the [initial] market launch, [businesses] will be able to scale their growth across other EU markets where TikTok Shop is [available] via the 'Sell Across Europe' feature. TikTok has been working to make shopping happen in the app in order to emulate the success it's seen with in-stream shopping in the China-based version of the app, called Douyin.","score":0.826278,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.71,"request_id":"c647981b-9e62-461f-8065-9c6791e0fddd"}
